channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Car debris and damage to bollard on island, 7th April
item.description:
Car debris from accident and damage to bollard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Lodge Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalism, 7th April
item.description:
Looks like paint or some other product has been thrown at the seatin, wall behind and paving area around it. Seat is unusable and substance is being daubed along the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Van Gogh Walk, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rent a bike left not in dedicated space, 7th April
item.description:
Bike is left just outside 55-59 gordon square

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Woburn Square, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Environmental health issues, 7th April
item.description:
REPORTED ON THAMSMEAD FMS- GREENWICH LAND- Ive been passing by this site on my way to the recycling centre and concerned that someone tried to put fire to this. There’s a risk of fire spreading down the hill/landscape.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nathan Way, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown vegetation which backs onto the tennis courts, 7th April
item.description:
Needs cutting, as overgrown.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Empress Drive, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and bulky waste outside Dekker and Cunningham House, 7th April
item.description:
In front of both buildings big piles of rubbish l/bulky waste left

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hopewell Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 7th April
item.description:
In Thomas lane se6 4RQ on the green next to the bus stand there’s a fridge that as been there from Saturday afternoon

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped rubbish, 7th April
item.description:
Rubbish in trolleys dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown neighbour's Tree, 7th April
item.description:
The overgrown neighbours tree is heavily leaning towards our property. For the past 6 years we have had issues with the tree and our neighbour every time we have tired to trim the branches which extends towards our property but the neighbour comes out with racist abuse and swaering at us we have young kids. Yesterday my husband attempted to trim the tree and the same thign happened. We have now reported the matter to police which is now under investigation but we still want the tree to be trimmed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harlington Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged car unmoved for ~ 3 weeks, 7th April
item.description:
Car has remained unmoved for a number of weeks. It has a damaged driver's side wing mirror.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rodway Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 7th April
item.description:
A dumped mattress and a broken wooden cupboard were left on the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selborne Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of street litter, 7th April
item.description:
Litter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 95a, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hackney Have Lost The Plot, 7th April
item.description:
6 Bikes abandoned all day outside our office. 2 Parking Bays have been taken up by Hackney for Bike Parking but users cant be bothered to use them and it doesn't matter as Hackney are able to control this ASB like other Boroughs

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Seven Sisters Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing, 7th April
item.description:
It's overflowing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Champion Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping between Madron St and Surrey Square, 7th April
item.description:
There are sofa parts, mattress/bed, industrial fridge and bags of rubbish, piles of cardboard dumped strategically along Old Kent Rd and amongst the commercial bins between Madron Street and Surrey Square. Food waste is amongst the rubbish and it is caused narrowing of the footpath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 240, Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally flying flag on public property, 7th April
item.description:
Flag has been illegally flying for months on public property. I assume this wasn't authorised by the local authority. It should be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Lewis Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish by stairway left here needs cleaning please, 7th April

.

item.title: Flytippingof builders waste and bags of rubbish that have be there for at least 2 days, 7th April
